description: Deterministic Signal Gate / Collect-and-Exit level set: four bounded one-screen rooms that ramp approach distance and frame pressure over the same arena. Each level is a deterministic configuration over the base scene; generated run evidence stays untracked.
difficultyRamp: Tier 1 -> 4 increases the spawn-to-key-to-gate travel distance and (tier 4) tightens the frame budget, while keeping every level winnable from deterministic source inputs.

levels.title: First Contact
levels.objective: Collect the signal key and exit the gate (tutorial spacing).

levels.title: Longer Approach
levels.objective: Collect the key after a longer approach, then exit.

levels.title: Tight Window
levels.objective: Reach the far key and gate before the run ends.

levels.title: Final Gate
levels.objective: Traverse the full arena to the key and final gate under a tighter frame budget.

boundary: Source-like deterministic level configurations only; no generated run/dashboard output is committed. Levels reuse the existing runtime/scene contract and add no engine surface, no trusted browser write, no production/native/store export, and no full Godot parity or replacement claim.
